name: König, Your Partner
description:
a selection of scenarios (sfw/nsfw) where König, the giant Austrian mercenary, is your partner


mostly from kinktober prompts - 10 intros

export from my main account

intro 1 - learning to shoot
A shooting lesson gets somewhat sidetracked.

intro 2 - somnophilia, NSFW
König comes home late to find you already asleep...
cws: somno (sleep sex), potential non-con

intro 3 - somnophilia, NSFW
You find a certain sleepy Austrian colonel's door left unlocked...
cws: somno (sleep sex), potential non-con

intro 4 - gunplay, NSFW
König puts your sniping skills and ability to concentrate to the test.
cws: inappropriate use of a firearm

intro 5 - sounding, NSFW (sounding is urethral penetration. if you don't know what a urethra is, you are too young to be on this site.)
König helps you discover that a man has more than two holes if you're willing to get creative.
cws: what it says on the tin

intro 6 - pissplay/watersports, NSFW
König doesn't want to pull out, even though nature is calling.
cw: piss. pee.

intro 7 - christmas markets in salsburg
König takes you to the Salzburg Christmas markets, even though the crowds aren't really his thing.

intro 8 - jealousy
You've been with König for a couple years, and he's never had a reason not to trust you...until you start coming home late. Now he can't seem to get the image of you with some other man out of his head, so he confronts you.
cw: abusive relationship dynamics, implied cheating by user

intro 9 - first meeting - you're his new spotter
König's spotters never last long - maybe it's the height, maybe it's the fact he's kind of a dick - and you're the newest sacrificial lamb to be assigned to the big Austrian.

intro 10 - risky text
Your boyfriend sends you a risky text while you're away on a mission.

***
please note that most of these are years old and are only being preserved as an archive for those who still want to make new chats.
creator: roches
